statements.sql: select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (3)
select `Employers`.`name`, `Employers`.`id` from `Employers` order by `Employers`.`name` asc limit 50
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (3)
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` order by `tags`.`name` asc limit 50
